quests.title: Reach Max Level
quests.description: Reach max level on the Discord server. If you need more help or info, open a ticket at https://discord.com/channels/1435017648751513713/1442140583220215949

quests.title: InGame Quest 1
quests.description: Reach stage 1 in https://www.roblox.com/games/118076856300045/Beta-uhh-yk. If you need help, open a ticket using the Discord link.
